sentences.target: Mon époux arrive vers dix heures.

translations.fr: Mon époux arrive vers dix heures.
translations.en: My husband is arriving around ten o'clock.
translations.es: Mi esposo llega a eso de las diez.
translations.de: Mein Mann kommt gegen zehn Uhr.
translations.it: Mio marito arriva verso le dieci.
translations.zh-Hans: 我丈夫会在十点左右到。
translations.yue: 我老公會喺十點左右到。
translations.ru: Мой муж приедет около десяти часов.
translations.pt: Meu marido chega por volta das dez.
translations.vi: Chồng tôi sẽ đến khoảng mười giờ.
translations.nl: Mijn man komt rond tien uur.
translations.uk: Мій чоловік приїде близько десятої години.
translations.hu: A férjem tíz óra körül érkezik.
translations.hi: मेरे पति करीब दस बजे पहुँचेंगे।
translations.el: Ο άντρας μου φτάνει γύρω στις δέκα.
translations.nb: Mannen min kommer rundt klokka ti.
translations.id: Suami saya akan tiba sekitar pukul sepuluh.
translations.sv: Min man kommer runt klockan tio.
translations.ro: Soțul meu sosește în jurul orei zece.
translations.da: Min mand kommer omkring klokken ti.
translations.ja: 夫は十時ごろに着きます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular possessor), masculine singular, modifies the following noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, présent de l’indicatif, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject 'époux'.
Preposition introducing an approximate time expression.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'heures' in a time expression.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'vers' in a clock-time expression.

sentences.target: Je cherche l'époux de Madame Colin.

translations.fr: Je cherche l'époux de Madame Colin.
translations.en: I'm looking for Mrs. Colin's husband.
translations.es: Busco al esposo de la señora Colin.
translations.de: Ich suche den Ehemann von Frau Colin.
translations.it: Cerco il marito della signora Colin.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找科林女士的丈夫。
translations.pt: Estou procurando o marido da senhora Colin.
translations.he: אני מחפשת את בעלה של גברת קולין.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm chồng của bà Colin.
translations.nl: Ik zoek de echtgenoot van mevrouw Colin.
translations.hi: मैं श्रीमती कोलिन के पति को ढूँढ़ रही हूँ।
translations.el: Ψάχνω τον σύζυγο της κυρίας Κολίν.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter ektemannen til fru Colin.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter fru Colins make.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter fru Colins mand.
translations.ja: コリン夫人のご主人を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, présent de l’indicatif, 1st person singular; transitive.
Noun with elided definite article 'l’' (from 'le') attached; definite direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a possessive/associative complement.
Honorific title used as part of a proper name.
Proper noun (surname); completes the named entity 'Madame Colin'.

sentences.target: Votre époux a déjà rempli ce formulaire.

translations.fr: Votre époux a déjà rempli ce formulaire.
translations.en: Your husband has already filled out this form.
translations.es: Su esposo ya ha rellenado este formulario.
translations.de: Ihr Ehemann hat dieses Formular bereits ausgefüllt.
translations.it: Suo marito ha già compilato questo modulo.
translations.zh-Hans: 您的丈夫已经填好了这份表格。
translations.yue: 你先生已經填好咗呢份表格。
translations.ru: Ваш муж уже заполнил эту форму.
translations.pt: Seu marido já preencheu este formulário.
translations.he: בעלך כבר מילא את הטופס הזה.
translations.vi: Chồng chị đã điền xong mẫu này rồi.
translations.ar: زوجك قد ملأ هذا النموذج بالفعل.
translations.nl: Uw echtgenoot heeft dit formulier al ingevuld.
translations.uk: Ваш чоловік уже заповнив цю форму.
translations.hu: Az ön férje már kitöltötte ezt az űrlapot.
translations.hi: आपके पति ने यह फॉर्म पहले ही भर दिया है।
translations.pl: Pani mąż już wypełnił ten formularz.
translations.el: Ο σύζυγός σας έχει ήδη συμπληρώσει αυτή τη φόρμα.
translations.nb: Din ektemann har allerede fylt ut dette skjemaet.
translations.id: Suami Anda sudah mengisi formulir ini.
translations.sv: Din make har redan fyllt i det här formuläret.
translations.ro: Soțul dumneavoastră a completat deja acest formular.
translations.cs: Váš manžel už vyplnil tento formulář.
translations.da: Din mand har allerede udfyldt denne formular.
translations.fi: Aviomiehenne on jo täyttänyt tämän lomakkeen.
translations.ja: ご主人はすでにこの書類を記入しました。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person plural/formal), modifies 'époux'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, présent de l’indicatif, 3rd person singular; forms the compound past with the participle.
Adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates temporal precedence.
Past participle; lexical verb in a compound tense with 'a' (passé composé); agrees only with a preceding direct object (none here).
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'formulaire'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'a rempli'.

sentences.target: Les époux arrivent demain à midi.

translations.fr: Les époux arrivent demain à midi.
translations.en: The married couple arrive tomorrow at noon.
translations.es: Los esposos llegan mañana al mediodía.
translations.de: Die Eheleute kommen morgen um zwölf.
translations.it: Gli sposi arrivano domani a mezzogiorno.
translations.zh-Hans: 这对夫妻明天中午到达。
translations.pt: O casal chega amanhã ao meio-dia.
translations.vi: Cặp vợ chồng sẽ đến vào trưa mai.
translations.nl: Het echtpaar komt morgen om twaalf uur.
translations.hi: दंपति कल दोपहर बारह बजे आएंगे।
translations.el: Το ζευγάρι φτάνει αύριο το μεσημέρι.
translations.nb: Ekteparet kommer i morgen klokka tolv.
translations.id: Pasangan suami istri datang besok siang.
translations.sv: Paret kommer i morgon klockan tolv.
translations.da: Ægteparret kommer i morgen klokken tolv.
translations.ja: 夫婦は明日正午に到着します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; determines 'époux'.
Common noun, plural reading (form identical to sg); head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, présent de l’indicatif, 3rd person plural; agrees with plural subject.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Preposition introducing a time complement.
Common noun denoting time of day; object of the preposition 'à'.
